name: competitive-audit
description: Designed by Capsule. Produces a professionally formatted Word competitive audit of a client's product against their market. Accepts a live website URL, an uploaded document (PDF / Word / PowerPoint / text), or both. Identifies the competitor set across four pricing tiers, runs per-competitor research, and builds a styled docx with executive summary, pricing comparison, feature matrix, wins/parity/gaps analysis, and prioritized recommendations (Trust / Product / Pricing / GTM).
